subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-26
subcodes.first_line: All of those Tablets were revealed by the lips of the Blessed Beauty. During the final blessed days [of Baha'u'llah], one of the friends asked [the same question] of Mírza Áqa Jan
subcodes.first_line_orig: تمام آن الواح از لسان جمال مبارک است در اواخر ایام مبارک یک نفر از احباب
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
